name: schedule
description: Manage schedule — create a schedule, list schedule triggers, get a schedule by id. available only on schedules associated with github oauth or bitbucket cloud pipeline definitions. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

parameters.name: project-slug
parameters.description: Project slug in the form `vcs-slug/org-name/repo-name`. The `/` characters may be URL-escaped. For projects that use GitLab or GitHub App, use `circleci` as the `vcs-slug`, replace `org-name` with the organization ID (found in Organization Settings), and replace `repo-name` with the project ID (found in Project Settings).

parameters.name: timetable
parameters.description: Timetable that specifies when a schedule triggers.

parameters.name: attribution-actor
parameters.description: The attribution-actor of the scheduled pipeline.

parameters.name: parameters
parameters.description: Pipeline parameters represented as key-value pairs. Must contain branch or tag.
